strategic_objective: Investigate the coexistence of near-constant and strongly varying features to characterize heterogeneous structural regimes and their temporal or network segment associations.
key_checks: Identify temporal or segment boundaries correlating with regime shifts
Compare class-conditioned structural variation patterns across regimes
Assess model sensitivity to regime heterogeneity
Evaluate potential for regime-aware modeling or detection strategies
success_criteria: Evidence linking heterogeneous regimes to distinct temporal phases or network segments
Characterization of regime-specific structural patterns and their stability
Understanding of how heterogeneity influences model behavior
router_constraints: preserve feature scope for heterogeneous regime features
preserve evidence references e8, e9, e10, e23, e24
